candidates.text: ACM Research Sees Prelim. Q1 Revenue $165M-$170M, Prelim. Total Shipments $154M-$157M

ACM Research Affirms FY2025 Sales Guidance of $850M-$950M vs $921.25M Est ACM is maintaining its revenue guidance range of $850 million to $950 million for fiscal year 2025. This expectation is based on ACM management's current assessment of the continuing impact from international trade ACM is maintaining its revenue guidance range of $850 million to $950 million for fiscal year 2025. This expectation is based on ACM management's current assessment of the continuing impact from international trade policy, together with various expected spending scenarios of key customers, supply chain constraints, and the timing of acceptances for first tools under evaluation in the field, among other factors.
